phrases.intent_en: Where are the event ticket booths on Letná Plain
phrases.text_local: Kde jsou na Letenské pláni pokladny na akce?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket booths for events on the plain are usually set up near the stage area.

likely_response.translation_en: Next to the main stage, on the right.

responses.english: Next to the main stage, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the Prague Metronome viewpoint
phrases.text_local: Kde je výhled na Pražský metronom?
phrases.cultural_note: The Metronome is a large kinetic sculpture, often simply called 'the pendulum'.

likely_response.local: Nahoře na pláni, u velkého kyvadla.
likely_response.translation_en: Up on the plain, by the large pendulum.

responses.english: Up on the plain, by the large pendulum.
responses.french: Nahoře na pláni, u velkého kyvadla.

phrases.intent_en: Which path leads to Vltava River views
phrases.text_local: Která cesta vede k výhledu na Vltavu?
phrases.cultural_note: The best river views are from the paths running along the plateau's edge.

phrases.intent_en: Is the beer garden open today
phrases.cultural_note: Beer gardens in Prague typically open in the late morning, around 11:00.
